title: hapalochilus rectilabris
intro: Hapalochilus rectilabris, also known as the Red Lip Cichlid Lily, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hapalochilus rectilabris include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
